payload.text:
Last month Anthropic was on 30bN.

We are so compute and Intelligence constrained.

Anthropic doesn’t even serve 1% of the enterprise - and as for Individual AI it doesn’t even really exist yet.

(A free layer of ChatGPT is not it.)
payload.full_text:
Last month Anthropic was on 30bN.

We are so compute and Intelligence constrained.

Anthropic doesn’t even serve 1% of the enterprise - and as for Individual AI it doesn’t even really exist yet.

(A free layer of ChatGPT is not it.)

quotedTweet.text:
Anthropic is now showing off $44 BILLION in annual recurring revenue.

This is up $14 billion (+46.6%) since last month!

BULLISH for AI Infrastructure $NVDA $AMD
